typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	DataTable as string (),
	SchemeId as integer (),
	ValuationDate as timestamp (),
	Cfg_ImportRunId as integer (),
	Cfg_ServiceHostTcpUri as string ()
}

source(output(
		SchemeId as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp,
		MarketValue as double
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT        ValuationDate, SchemeId, MarketValue FROM            Staging.ChannelAssetDailyValuationTransform WHERE        (ImportRunId = ?)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Transform	source(output(
		id as integer,
		ClientLocationID as integer,
		SchemeName as string,
		Namespace as string,
		BeginningYearMonth as integer,
		MonthsLookback as integer,
		ApplySmoothing as boolean,
		LowerCorridor as double,
		UpperCorridor as double,
		AssetDivGrowthPercent as double,
		AssetDivProjectionYears as integer,
		RPIBaseMonth as integer,
		zTimeStamp as string,
		Currency as string,
		DailyValuationStart as date,
		timingOfExpectedBenefitPaymentsId as integer,
		timingOfExpectedExpensesId as integer,
		interestTypeId as integer,
		assetValuationMethodId as integer,
		interestCostMethodologyId as integer,
		gainLossCorridor as double,
		fiscalYearStartMonth as integer,
		HasActives as boolean,
		HasDeferreds as boolean,
		HasPensioners as boolean,
		RequiresAssetHistVar as boolean,
		RequiresAssetMcVar as boolean,
		CreatedBy as integer,
		Created as timestamp,
		GenerateMarketEvents as boolean,
		SchemeTypeId as integer,
		DailyValuationFeed as boolean,
		FundDailyValuationEnabled as boolean
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from Clients.Scheme',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> LookupFundDVFlagLKPTABLE
Transform,LookupFundDVFlagLKPTABLE lookup(SchemeId == id,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'any',
	broadcast: 'none')~> LookupFundDVFlag
LookupFundDVFlag split(isMatch(), disjoint: true) ~> LookupFundDVFlagIsMatch@(Match,NotMatch)
LookupFundDVFlagIsMatch@Match derive(IsCompleted = iif(FundDailyValuationEnabled, false(), true()),
		UtcAuditDate = notConvertedectfunctiondatetimegetUtcDate(),
		Suspect = false()) ~> Addcolumns
Addcolumns sink(input(
		IsCompleted as boolean,
		UtcAuditDate as timestamp 'ect.format.datetime.hypen.4year2month2day2hour24mmnute2secondsdot6nanoseconds',
		Suspect as boolean,
		FundDailyValuationEnabled as boolean,
		SchemeId as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp 'ect.format.datetime.hypen.4year2month2day2hour24mmnute2secondsdot6nanoseconds',
		MarketValue as double,
		{} as boolean
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	mapColumn(
		IsCompleted,
		UtcAuditDate,
		Suspect,
		FundDailyValuationEnabled,
		SchemeId,
		ValuationDate,
		MarketValue,
		{})) ~> OutputPlaceHolderScriptComponent
